title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 11 - 2017: Flatironsia in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder, covering audio issues with his previous vlog, late-night organizing sessions, a hardware store trip to fix his sagging deck table, shampooing his van at his mom's house, and ongoing frustrations with a car light he's trying to fix before selling his car. He ends by planning his next day and explaining his idea to create the video background first so he can describe it at the start of the vlog.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels superstitious and spooked, as if the car doesn't want to be sold due to repeated mechanical problems arising when he tries
frustrated that it feels like it has been going on for years and is never-ending
realized it's better to create the background first so he can describe it at the start of the video, making it more engaging

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday's video had barely any sound, and I didn't do anything different to cause it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I recently discovered that wireless earbuds can interfere with recording sound.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I use a website that reads text aloud so I can listen while doing other things around the house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I stayed up until 3 AM working, but I wasn't very efficient.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like organizing my house has been taking forever, even though it shouldn't be that complicated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom mentioned that it's the end of the Tibetan New Year, a time when people traditionally reorganize their homes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I got up at noon and worked on organizing my garage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought wood to fix my sagging table but had to return to the hardware store because the first method didn't work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to find an electrical outlet at my mom's house to power my band equipment since my garage setup is too high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent hours shampooing my car's rug and realized I might have used too much shampoo concentrate before.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My car's main light stopped working again after I paid to have it fixed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel superstitious that my car doesn't want to be sold because issues keep arising when I try.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm focusing on making my car look presentable before selling it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm also organizing my digital files and considering different hard drives.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow I plan to work on my car and apartment organization again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I have enough money to get by even if I sell my car for less than expected.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to decide whether to record a video first or create the background for it first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized it's better to make the background first so I can talk about it in the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think starting the video by discussing the background will make it more engaging.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's 12:21 AM, and I'm going to sleep now.
